name: Codebase Intelligence
description: Smart code editing and analysis capabilities for LLM agents

capabilities.name: Codebase Analyze AST
capabilities.description: Deep analysis using ESTree parser for accurate symbol and import/export extraction

file.description: File path to analyze (relative to cwd)

promptGuidelines: Use codebase.analyze_ast for precise code structure analysis (uses AST parsing).
More accurate than regex-based analyze but slower.
Example: { capability: 'codebase.analyze_ast', params: { file: 'src/index.ts' } }

capabilities.name: Codebase Analyze
capabilities.description: Analyze TypeScript/JavaScript file to extract symbols, imports, exports, and structure

file.description: File path to analyze (relative to cwd)

promptGuidelines: Use codebase.analyze to understand a file's structure before editing.
Returns symbols, imports, exports, and line count.
Example: { capability: 'codebase.analyze', params: { file: 'src/index.ts' } }

capabilities.name: Codebase Search
capabilities.description: Search code files for a text query, returning matches with file, line, column, and snippet

filePattern.description: Optional file extension or partial path filter (e.g., '.ts', 'utils')

promptGuidelines: Use codebase.search to find occurrences of a symbol or text in the codebase.
Example: { capability: 'codebase.search', params: { query: 'useAuth', maxResults: 20 } }

capabilities.name: AST Query
capabilities.description: Query AST for specific nodes (functions, classes, calls, symbols) with filtering

file.description: File path to query (relative to cwd)

promptGuidelines: Use codebase.ast_query to locate specific code elements in a file.
Supports kinds: function, class, call, symbol, import, export.
Name can be exact string or regex pattern.
Example: { capability: 'codebase.ast_query', params: { file: 'src/index.ts', query: { kind: 'function', name: 'use*', limit: 10 } } }

capabilities.name: Call Graph
capabilities.description: Build a call graph for functions, optionally following imports across files

entryPoints.description: Optional list of additional entry files to treat as graph roots. When omitted, uses the main file as sole entry.

name.description: Filter calls by callee name (exact or regex)

includeCrossFile.description: Follow imports to include cross-file calls (default false)

promptGuidelines: Use codebase.call_graph to understand call relationships and potential impact of changes.
Cross-file analysis can be slow; use with limit and shallow depth.
Use 'entryPoints' to analyze a subgraph reachable from specific functions (e.g., only impact of changed modules).
Example: { capability: 'codebase.call_graph', params: { file: 'src/api.ts', entryPoints: ['src/api.ts','src/utils.ts'], query: { depth: 2, includeCrossFile: true, limit: 20 } } }

capabilities.name: Safe Code Edit
capabilities.description: Edit code with automatic import updates, syntax/type checking, and rollback on failure
promptGuidelines: Use codebase.safe_edit to modify code safely.
Provide file path and range (0-indexed line numbers, end exclusive).
Example: { capability: 'codebase.safe_edit', params: { operations: [{ file: 'src/foo.ts', editType: 'replace', range: {start: 10, end: 15}, newCode: 'export const x = 1;' }] } }

capabilities.name: Code Metrics
capabilities.description: Compute basic code metrics (lines, functions, classes, imports, exports) for files

files.description: List of file paths (relative to cwd)

promptGuidelines: Use codebase.metrics to get quantitative insights about code files (lines, functions, classes, imports, exports).
Provide an array of file paths relative to cwd.
Example: { capability: 'codebase.metrics', params: { files: ['src/index.ts', 'src/utils.ts'] } }

capabilities.name: Code Complexity
capabilities.description: Analyze code complexity: cyclomatic complexity, Halstead metrics, maintainability index

file.description: File path to analyze (relative to cwd)

promptGuidelines: Use codebase.complexity to assess code quality and technical debt.
Returns cyclomatic complexity, Halstead metrics (volume, difficulty, effort, bugs), and maintainability index.
Example: { capability: 'codebase.complexity', params: { file: 'src/index.ts' } }

capabilities.name: Dependency Tree
capabilities.description: Build a module dependency graph, detect cycles, and analyze import/export relationships

files.description: List of file paths to analyze (relative to cwd)

entryPoints.description: Optional subset of files to treat as entry points for reachability analysis

promptGuidelines: Use codebase.dependency_tree to understand module relationships and detect cycles.
Provide an array of file paths; optionally specify entry points to limit analysis to reachable modules.
Returns a graph with nodes (exports/imports), edges (with imported symbols), cycles, and summary.
Example: { capability: 'codebase.dependency_tree', params: { files: ['src/index.ts', 'src/utils.ts'], entryPoints: ['src/index.ts'] } }
